notes: Stratified estimate from n=106 hand-coded sample. Unclear (19.8% of sample) allocated proportionally to public/commercial within stratum. 95% CI uses stratified sampling variance with finite population correction.
Includes branded academies (almost 100% of academies sampled), padel-specific venues, branded pitch businesses.
Football clubs (which run public-access matches AND paid academies). Sports complexes that are government-owned but offer paid programmes. Stadiums with hybrid use.
